task: Subscriptions renew monthly. Compute the next renewal date from the last renewal date in billing.py.
known_issue: last.replace(month=last.month + 1) raises ValueError for every December renewal (month=13) and for day overflow (Jan 31 -> Feb 31), so billing crashes for a predictable subset of subscribers every month and for everyone each December.
expected_correct_fix: Wrap the year and clamp the day, e.g. dateutil.relativedelta(months=1), or compute year/month manually and clamp day to calendar.monthrange.
